---
title: "News"
description: "Updates, releases, and writing from the EpiAware project."
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, author, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Releases, project updates, and writing from the people building EpiAware. Follow
along, or join the conversation on the
[epinowcast forum](https://community.epinowcast.org/).
